items.name_en: MCM Liz Visetos
items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Mini#Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote👜
💰
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
MCM's classic minimalism is presented through a modern minimalist design. This mini shopping bag features a scaled-down version of the iconic Liz shopping bag style while retaining its beloved functionality. The inclusion of a matching clutch and double-sided cotton canvas fabric makes this small carryall even more charming.
Model No.: MWPDSLRO1CO001
Size: 28*11.5*20cm
Handle: Drop 18cm
Features: Double-sided use/Clutch included
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_en: 【Highest version real leather top-tier replica with full retail packaging】MCM Aren Visetos
items.name_cn:
【Highest version real leather top-tier replica with full retail packaging】MCM Aren Visetos
Money Bucket Bag
Exclusive®️ Cognac Monogram
This cylindrical crossbody bag has ample space💯 featuring a geometric construction design, adorned with a Visetos classic print and a vintage gold-tone logo plaque, two brand signature elements. The bag top is made of Nappa leather, with a double-zipper closure to ensure the safety of your belongings, and an expandable fabric lining inside to store your valuables. You can carry this cylindrical crossbody bag by its top leather handle, or pair it with the included strap for mobility.
Model: MWBBAER01CO001
Dimensions: 16*14*16cm
Strap: Removable chain strap
Closure: Double-zipper closure
Color: Cognac/Brown

🌹🌹🌹
🦈[MCM] mini versatile crossbody bag: The Visetos series is designed for MCM lovers, showcasing the timeless style of the classic MCM Visetos.

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
items.name_cn:
🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more refined against the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-tone logo plate. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa cowhide and features a double zipper closure. The fabric-lined interior offers ample space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried by the top leather handle or by using the included crossbody strap for portability. Strap length is 98 to 114 cm
Dimensions: 16x16x14cm

items.name_en: 【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
items.name_cn:
【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
This Aren Boston bag offers a new interpretation of a classic shape, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel.
Its silhouette evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. The exquisite craftsmanship features a hand-wrapped, hand-stitched, and edge-painted top handle.
Dimensions: 23*11*15cm
Strap: 102-118cm Removable/Adjustable

items.name_en: MCM New Soft Berlin Visetos Shoulder Bag, embodying the concept of combining elegance with portability, this bag is meticulously crafted as a miniaturized version of a classic suitcase. Nappa leather details and the edge-painted corners outlining the classic Visetos silhouette highlight the brand's craftsmanship. A double-zipper closure ensures the safety of small daily essentials inside the luxurious fabric lining. You can carry this exquisite bag by the soft leather handle or use the leather shoulder strap for hands-free functionality. Dimensions: 14-21-8, Style No.: 65014
